ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-07-2020 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-25-2020 Continued To Jul-07-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-10-2020 Continued To Apr-14-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jonathan Lee for Tina Lee (Petitioner).

The Court stated that it only has an unfiled verification and proof of service, and that the proof of service is not the correct form. Mr. Lee stated that as of yesterday both documents have been submitted for e-filing and that they had not been filed. Mr. Lee also stated that there was no appearance at the last hearing because it was a miscommunication on his part. The Petition for Final Distribution, etc. is continued to April 14, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The order to appear is off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Mar-10-2020 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Feb-04-2020 Continued To Mar-10-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-04-2020 Continued To Mar-10-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that an order to appear was issued on October 29, 2019, that it still does not have endorsed filed courtesy copies of the petition for final distribution, and that it does not have a proof of service that is on a Judicial Council form, or shows that the notice of hearing was properly served. The Petition for Final Distribution on Waiver of Accounting and the Order to Appear are continued to March 10, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.

Off Calendar Oct-29-2019 Continued To Nov-26-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor and the Attorney to appear on November 26, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the courtesy copies have not been provided. The accounting petition re: final distribution is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-02-2019 Continued To Aug-06-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor and the Attorney to appear on August 6, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the inventory and apprasial, and a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
